name: Along the Edge of the Sky
short_description: Along the Edge of the Sky is a dynamic first-person action-platformer where you must escape Limbo and reach the Heavens. The road ahead is tough, and you will need to destroy hordes of demons along the way. Can you traverse this path and not give up? In this thrilling escape, it all depends on you!
detailed_description:
Along the Edge of the Sky is a dynamic first-person action-platformer where you must escape Limbo and reach the Heavens. You only have your speed, agility, and accuracy. The road ahead is tough, and you will need to destroy hordes of demons along the way. Can you traverse this path and not give up? In this thrilling escape, it all depends on you!

- You are a lost soul trapped in Limbo, striving to reach the heavens, but you need redemption. Destroy the demons blocking your way to approach the edge and open the gates of Heaven for yourself.

- Collect shards from demons that will help you overcome obstacles.

- You will pass through five circles of Limbo, each unique in its nature and filled with its own challenges.

- Shoot accurately and skillfully overcome obstacles to set records and be the first to escape this misty place.

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Turkish, Polish, Czech, Kazakh
*languages with full audio support
